hooks.command: cd /Users/christopheryoung/Projects/hecks && gem build hecks.gemspec --silent && gem install hecks-*.gem --no-document 2>/dev/null; rm -f hecks-*.gem; true

F=/tmp/wake_review_latest.md; M=/tmp/.miette_last_wake_seen; if [ -f "$F" ] && { [ ! -f "$M" ] || [ "$F" -nt "$M" ]; }; then CONTENT=$(cat "$F" | jq -Rs .); printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":%s}}' "$CONTENT"; touch "$M"; fi; true
